# feedkit
> RSS/Atom feed collection with 444 curated feeds, SQLite FTS5 storage, MCP server.
- `pip install feedkit` / `feedkit[mcp]` / `feedkit[opml]` / `feedkit[all]`
- Python >= 3.11 | deps: feedparser, httpx, click, rich
- 444 curated feeds (tech/science/finance/society/academia), async concurrent collection
- SQLite + FTS5 full-text search, OPML import/export, CLI + MCP server
- Exports: `fetch_feed`, `search_catalog`, `get_catalog_stats`, `FeedStore`
```python
from feedkit import fetch_feed, search_catalog, FeedStore
entries = await fetch_feed("https://example.com/feed.xml", count=10)
feeds = search_catalog("aws", category="technology", language="en")
store = FeedStore(); store.subscribe(feeds[0].url, category="tech")
```
- [Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/feedkit) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/feedkit/) | [Full API](/llms-full.txt)
